home.testimonials.title: Testimonials
home.testimonials.subtitle: What travelers have said after their trip with us.
home.testimonials.quote_1: Airport pickup was on time and our guide’s English was easy to follow. Ha Long looked better than the photos; the old-quarter room was small but clean, as they’d described by email.
home.testimonials.quote_2: Booked a 3-day Mekong trip online and got a reply the same day. The local restaurants were a highlight; heavy rain one afternoon meant a shorter boat ride than planned.
home.testimonials.quote_3: We had young kids and worried about a packed schedule, but lunch breaks were sensible and we didn’t start too early. Thanks for moving the kayak slot when our child was unwell on day three.
home.testimonials.scene_alt_1: Ảnh: vịnh Hạ Long — núi đá vôi và biển, Việt Nam.
home.testimonials.scene_alt_2: Travel photo: boats on a tropical river.
home.testimonials.scene_alt_3: Travel photo: turquoise sea and palm-fringed shore.

admin.tour_form.slug_auto: The URL slug is generated automatically from the title.
admin.tour_form.description_hint: Shown in the hero (short excerpt) and in the Overview section (full text).
admin.tour_form.thumbnail_help: Paste a direct image URL and/or pick an image below. If you select from the library, that image takes priority over the URL field.
admin.tour_form.gallery_help: Image URL, YouTube link (watch, embed, Shorts, youtu.be), or pick from the library. Order matches the public carousel after the thumbnail. Use + to add another item.
admin.tour_form.itinerary_hint: Order of blocks = day 1, day 2, … Rows without a title are ignored when saving.
admin.tour_form.duration_from_itinerary: Tour length (days) is set automatically from the number of itinerary steps (minimum 1).
